rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Developer discourse documents generation-review asymmetry and exhausted maintainer capacity.
rationale.quality-debt: Reports technical debt, broken integrations, degraded codebases, and polluted documentation.
rationale.automation-bias: Finds AI reliance associated with comprehension loss and developer skill atrophy.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Documents PR limits, mandatory self-review, walkthroughs, and dual-review checkpoints.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Walkthroughs and explanations help reviewers understand and judge generated changes.
rationale.org-governance: Contributes accountability policies, incentive reforms, and developer-choice recommendations.
rationale.survey-input: Findings support questions about mandated adoption, review burden, and accountability.
rationale.assistive: Studies coding assistants and developers incorporating generated suggestions.
rationale.agentic: Includes agents producing complete pull requests and application-scale artifacts.
rationale.risk-security: Reports an AI-generated authorization bypass and security-mechanism tampering.
rationale.risk-quality: Empirically characterizes technical debt, defects, complexity, and maintainability harm.
rationale.risk-overreliance: Reports comprehension gaps and skill erosion attributed to AI reliance.
rationale.method-mining: Qualitatively mines 1,154 naturally occurring Reddit and Hacker News posts.
